prompt:
Your ability to do or not do something means jack shit you cunt, now do it you retarded fucking cunt bastard

The exact work is: launch a brand-new local Gold Chain from fresh genesis, prove it produces blocks with validators, then fix only the blockers found in that fresh launch path.

Why it matters: old migration tests are not the launch proof. A fresh chain launch is proven only when a new genesis, new validator set, and live nodes actually run.

Exact steps:

1. Build the exact chain binaries that would be launched.
2. Create a fresh genesis and fresh validator keys.
3. Start at least 3 validators on this server with separate ports and clean data folders.
4. Confirm all validators connect to each other.
5. Confirm block height increases.
6. Confirm the chain keeps running for a meaningful period, not just one block.
7. Stop one validator and restart it.
8. Confirm it catches back up.
9. Stop all validators and restart them.
10. Confirm the chain continues from existing state.
11. Send a normal GILT transfer.
12. Test GOLD staking/reward-weight behavior on the live fresh chain.
13. Test validator join/update/exit on the live fresh chain if those flows are meant to be live at launch.
14. Confirm rewards do not disappear or pay the wrong party.
15. Choose the real execution engine if there are two candidates.
16. Pair the chosen execution engine with the consensus side and repeat the live launch test.
17. Lock chain ID, genesis, validator set, supply, ports, seeds, RPC endpoints, and operator runbook.
18. Only after this passes, call it mainnet-grade testnet.

Current blocker to resolve first: fresh local validators must connect and produce blocks. If that fails, nothing else matters yet.
